name: skribble
description: Production-grade real-time multiplayer drawing & guessing game (Skribbl.io clone)

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@skribble/shared && npm run build --workspace=@skribble/backend && npm run build --workspace=@skribble/frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace=@skribble/backend" "npm run dev --workspace=@skribble/frontend"
